message:
feat(robot): add transactional execution types to robot_types (ft-1i2ge.8.8)

Add self-contained tx robot types for ft robot tx plan/run/rollback/show:
TxStepRisk, TxPhaseState, TxPreconditionKind, TxCompensationKind,
TxStepOutcome, TxResumeRecommendation, TxBundleClassification enums;
TxPlanData, TxRunData, TxRollbackData, TxShowData, TxResumeData,
TxStepData, TxStepRecordData, TxChainVerificationData structs.
16 unit tests + 16 proptests, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
